stories.headline: EU Unveils Ambitious Green Hydrogen Investment Plan
stories.summary: The European Union announced a multi-billion euro investment to accelerate green hydrogen production, aiming to boost energy independence and combat climate change.

stories.headline: Global Tech Leaders Agree on AI Safety and Ethics Framework
stories.summary: Major tech companies and governments signed a landmark agreement on AI safety protocols and ethical guidelines, seeking to prevent misuse and foster responsible innovation.

stories.headline: Sudan Peace Talks Yield Breakthrough Agreement
stories.summary: Rival factions in Sudan reached a preliminary peace agreement after weeks of negotiations, offering hope for an end to the prolonged conflict and humanitarian crisis.

stories.headline: Asian Manufacturing Hubs Face Supply Chain Disruptions Amid New Sanctions
stories.summary: Key Asian manufacturing regions are experiencing renewed supply chain pressures following new international sanctions, impacting global trade and consumer prices.

stories.headline: New Dengue Vaccine Shows High Efficacy in Phase 3 Trials Across Americas
stories.summary: A novel dengue fever vaccine demonstrated significant efficacy in final clinical trials, offering a major tool against the mosquito-borne disease prevalent in the region.
